data.body: Pass-1 (T8 overlay) review note: structural-completeness probe on the Pass-4 coach move registry / subject schema. Verified against src/rebar/llm/plan_review/orchestrator.py (MOVE_REGISTRY + load_move_registry) and passes.py (_pass4_model, pass4_coach, _validate_subject) — move_id vocabulary, subject validator, and the no-valid-subject fallback are all fully specified and backed by code. One PROVEN gap: the plan declares each move carries `triggers (criteria/finding-class)` and that moves 11/12 fire conditionally ("when the ticket has children" / "per review"), but the registry schema (`{id, name, template}`) defines no `triggers` field and selection is delegated wholly to the LLM with no co-located decision rule. See checklist finding below.
